name: python3-django-guardian
title: python3-django-guardian
summary: per object permissions of django for Python3
description:
per object permissions of django for Python3
For Python3.
Implementation of per object permissions as authorization backend which is
supported since Django 1.2. It provides features as followings;
- Object permissions for Django_
- AnonymousUser support
- High level API
- Heavely tested
- Django's admin integration
- Decorators
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-guardian because per object permissions of django for Python3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-guardian as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-guardian with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-guardian --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
